title: La risa de la ciudad
writer: Pancho Córdova, Gilberto Gazcón, Jesús Marín
actors: José Elías Moreno, Joaquín Cordero, Alma Delia Fuentes
plot: The underside of Mexico City: street performers, factory workers, a drunk, an old man with civic pride, a pickpocket, and others live and interact in a shantytown near the Basilica of Our Lady of Guadalupe. Techo, the old man, lon...
